disposition.reason: blackfoot-telecom is not locally available for L168 declaration repair. The configured catalog remote cubcloud-gitea:jzest/blackfoot.git fails DNS resolution and the direct Gitea HTTP fallback timed out, so Flywheel cannot safely inspect or stamp a repo-local tenant declaration in this pass. Re-run L168 when the CubCloud/Gitea remote resolver is healthy or the repo is cloned locally.

picoz is a safety-critical personal trading research repo with market/API credentials and local/Postgres migration history, but no Supabase tenant ref or repo-local Infisical workspace declaration was found. Forcing it into the current Supabase-shaped L168 registry would be false precision. It needs a SkillOS adapter for non-Supabase secret contexts before L168 can become a hard deploy gate for this class.
